productDisplayName: Timex Expedition Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch, black, circular case with screw detail, has stainless steel backDial style: Black, textured dial, has orange markings, orange hour and minute hands with steel toned accents, orange seconds hand, red and white pointers for alarm, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screws to reset time and alarm, three face chronograph display, two push buttons to reset chronograph, date display at the 4 hour mark, alarm, Indiglo night-light, night modeStrap style: Black, textured, synthetic strap, has a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 metresComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
